name: NetworkTwinIQ
tagline: AI-Powered Network Digital Twin for Enterprise Change Validation
description: Validate every network change on a safe digital copy of your production environment before it ever goes live. NetworkTwinIQ mirrors your routers, firewalls, load balancers, branch sites, datacenters, and cloud across a vendor-agnostic twin with AI risk scoring.
image: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 200'%3E%3Crect width='200' height='200' fill='%23182d4d'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='100' cy='100' r='55' fill='none' stroke='%2322d3ee' stroke-width='2'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='70' cy='75' r='7' fill='%2322d3ee'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='130' cy='75' r='7' fill='%2322d3ee'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='100' cy='135' r='7' fill='%2322d3ee'/%3E%3Cline x1='100' y1='100' x2='70' y2='75' stroke='%2322d3ee' stroke-width='1.5'/%3E%3Cline x1='100' y1='100' x2='130' y2='75' stroke='%2322d3ee' stroke-width='1.5'/%3E%3Cline x1='100' y1='100' x2='100' y2='135' stroke='%2322d3ee' stroke-width='1.5'/%3E%3C/svg%3E
capabilities: Multi-Vendor Verification: Static reachability and ACL validation across Cisco, Juniper, Palo Alto, F5, Fortinet, and more.
AI Risk Scoring & Copilot: Every change gets a risk score and a plain-English blast-radius explanation for change-approval boards.
Hybrid & Multi-Cloud: One unified model spanning branch, datacenter, and AWS / Azure / GCP.
Governance & Compliance: Continuous drift detection with audit-ready evidence packages for compliance teams.
